description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 형태가 파편화되고 충돌하며 모노크롬과 네온 포인트의 고대비 디지털 왜곡 효과를 만들어내는 KURO-X의 미래지향적 비전입니다.
description.en: A futuristic vision of KURO-X where sharp geometric shapes fragment and collide, creating a high-contrast digital distortion effect in monochrome and neon accents.

prompt: Cinematic shot of KURO-X character, geometric glitch art style, fragmented polygons, digital artifacting, sharp vector lines, high contrast black and white with cyan and magenta edge highlights, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, abstract data visualization, tech-noir aesthetic, distorted architecture background.
